response.global_analysis:
1. Song Segmentation: Tracked three distinct song performances ('Phony', 'Way 2 U', and 'Villain') and one central narrative segment.
2. Transcription Accuracy: Checked phonetic cues carefully, transcribing the Korean vocal line in 'Way 2 U' ('떨리는 내 목소리') and matching on-screen furigana for 'Villain'.
3. Timing & Truncation: Set precise start and end times to eliminate cascading delays, prioritizing vocal delivery as the primary guide. Used visual triggers for song title cards.

subtitles.original: 何時しかそらの音がいやに鳴り合って
subtitles.english: Before I knew it, the sound of the sky became unpleasant to hear,

subtitles.original: 色の目があなたを溶いている
subtitles.english: and the color of my eyes is melting you.

subtitles.original: 鏡に映るあたしを欠いて
subtitles.english: Missing the me reflected in the mirror,

subtitles.original: 誰しもが見間違った虚像（フェイク）
subtitles.english: a fake that everyone misunderstood.

subtitles.original: 如何して愛なんてものに群がり
subtitles.english: Why do people flock to things like love

subtitles.original: それを欲して生きるのだ
subtitles.english: and live desiring them?

subtitles.original: 今日も泳いでいる夜の電車が通り去っていく
subtitles.english: Today too, the night train I'm swimming in passes by.

subtitles.original: 踊り明かせよ
subtitles.english: Dance until dawn.

subtitles.original: パッパラ パッパ ララッパッパ
subtitles.english: Pappara pappa rarappappa.

subtitles.original: 謎々騙して歌いましょう
subtitles.english: Let's deceive each other and sing riddles.

subtitles.original: タタッタラ タッ タラ ラッタッタ
subtitles.english: Tatattara tatta ra rattatta.

subtitles.original: 何故 何故 此処が痛むのでしょう
subtitles.english: Why, why, I wonder why it hurts here?

subtitles.original: 散々な日々は変わらないわ
subtitles.english: This miserable life won't change.

subtitles.original: 絶望の雨は止まないわ
subtitles.english: The rain of despair won't stop.

subtitles.original: さようならも言えぬ儘泣いた
subtitles.english: Saying goodbye without even being able to say it, I cried.

subtitles.original: フォニイ フォニイ フォニイ
subtitles.english: Phony, Phony, Phony.

subtitles.original: 嘘に絡まっているただ
subtitles.english: Just tangled in lies.

subtitles.original: 簡単なことも解らないわ
subtitles.english: I don't even know simple things.

subtitles.original: あたしって何だっけ
subtitles.english: What was I again?

subtitles.original: それすら夜の手に絆されて愛のように消える
subtitles.english: Even that is tied up by the hands of the night and disappears like love.

subtitles.original: さようならまたねと呟いた
subtitles.english: "Goodbye, see you later," I whispered.

subtitles.original: フォニイ フォニイ フォニイ
subtitles.english: Phony, Phony, Phony.

subtitles.original: 嘘に絡まっているあたしはフォニイ
subtitles.english: I, tangled in lies, am a Phony.

subtitles.original: 造花だけが知っている秘密のフォニイ
subtitles.english: A secret Phony that only artificial flowers know.

subtitles.original: Way 2 U / [Title Card]
subtitles.english: [Title: Way 2 U]

subtitles.original: Lately I realized I would never be, never be alone
subtitles.english: Lately I realized I would never be, never be alone

subtitles.original: It was always right in front of me
subtitles.english: It was always right in front of me

subtitles.original: Do you know, do you remember, remember
subtitles.english: Do you know, do you remember, remember

subtitles.original: How we used to be so carefree
subtitles.english: How we used to be so carefree

subtitles.original: Oh, hey
subtitles.english: Oh, hey

subtitles.english: Hardly ever get a chance to speak alone

subtitles.original: The goddess Kronii's desire to go to the human world and cause mischief grew.
subtitles.english: The goddess Kronii's desire to go to the human world and cause mischief grew.

subtitles.original: And so, she broke the rules and set foot in the Lake of Light.
subtitles.english: And so, she broke the rules and set foot in the Lake of Light.

subtitles.original: The disturbance in the lake drew the attention of the Heavenly Guardians,
subtitles.english: The disturbance in the lake drew the attention of the Heavenly Guardians,

subtitles.original: who seized Kronii and imprisoned her in a cage.
subtitles.english: who seized Kronii and imprisoned her in a cage.

subtitles.original: Wait, I haven't done anything yet!
subtitles.english: Wait, I haven't done anything yet!

subtitles.original: I was just interested in humans and just wanted to talk!
subtitles.english: I was just interested in humans and just wanted to talk!

subtitles.original: ヴィラン / [Title Card]
subtitles.english: [Title: Villain]

subtitles.original: きっと手を繋ぐだけでゾッとされる
subtitles.english: I'm sure I'll be looked at with horror just by holding hands.

subtitles.original: 馬鹿げた競争（ラットレース）一抜けたら通報される
subtitles.english: If I drop out of the stupid rat race, I'll be reported.

subtitles.original: 突然変異じゃない ただの僕さ
subtitles.english: I'm not a mutant, I'm just me.

subtitles.original: Xとか Yとか
subtitles.english: X or Y or...

subtitles.original: べき論者様は善悪多頭飼い
subtitles.english: Authority figures feed multiple heads of good and evil.

subtitles.original: 僕が君を「侵害」するって言いふらしてる
subtitles.english: They spread the word that I "violate" you.
